headline: 3 Highly Ranked Medical Stocks to Buy Now: DVA, GMED, PGNY
summary: These highly ranked medical stocks have been capitalizing on their sales expansion, and their defensive or secular growth profiles could become even more attractive if an economic downturn emerges.

headline: TD Cowen Maintains Hold on DaVita, Raises Price Target to $201
summary: TD Cowen  analyst Ryan Langston   maintains DaVita (NYSE:DVA) with a Hold and raises the price target from $144 to $201.
